# DIFL — Dante Institute of Foreign Languages, Jaipur

> Jaipur's oldest foreign language institute, founded in 1970 by Late Dr. V K Sharma. 55+ years of teaching, 12 languages, 35,000+ students. Known for the patented TTP (Thought Translation Process) method that uses the learner's mother tongue as a bridge to fluency. Online, offline, and hybrid classes available worldwide.

Languages taught: French, Japanese, German, Spanish, Chinese (Mandarin), Korean, Arabic, Italian, Russian, English, Thai, and Hindi for foreigners.

Exam preparation: JLPT, DELF/DALF, TEF Canada, TCF Canada, Goethe, DELE, SIELE, HSK, TOPIK, EPS-TOPIK, IELTS, TOEFL, OET.

Programs: Ausbildung Germany, MEXT Japan scholarship, Campus France, GKS Korea scholarship, TITP/SSW Japan, Canada PR French pathway.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://mydifl.com/): Institute overview, all 12 language courses, team, testimonials
- [Blog](https://mydifl.com/blog.html): 44+ in-depth guides on language exams, culture, study plans, and careers
- [Exam Calendar](https://mydifl.com/exam-calendar/): 2026 dates, fees, and India centers for 11 major language exams
- [Language Quiz](https://mydifl.com/language-quiz/): Free level-check quiz for 9 languages, 3 difficulty levels
- [Languages for Professionals](https://mydifl.com/language-for-professionals/): Industry-specific language guidance
- [About DIFL](https://mydifl.com/?page=about): History, founder, TTP method
- [Scholarships](https://mydifl.com/?page=scholarships): V K Sharma Memorial Scholarship and concessions

## Language courses

- [French](https://mydifl.com/?page=french): DELF, DALF, TEF Canada, TCF Canada
- [Japanese](https://mydifl.com/?page=japanese): JLPT N5–N1, TITP/SSW
- [German](https://mydifl.com/?page=german): Goethe A1–C2, Ausbildung
- [Spanish](https://mydifl.com/?page=spanish): DELE, SIELE
- [Korean](https://mydifl.com/?page=korean): TOPIK, EPS-TOPIK, GKS
- [Chinese Mandarin](https://mydifl.com/?page=chinese): HSK 1–6, HSKK
- [Arabic](https://mydifl.com/?page=arabic): Gulf employment, IFS
- [Italian](https://mydifl.com/?page=italian): PLIDA, CILS
- [Russian](https://mydifl.com/?page=russian): TORFL
- [English](https://mydifl.com/?page=english): IELTS, TOEFL, OET
- [Thai](https://mydifl.com/?page=thai)
- [Hindi for foreigners](https://mydifl.com/?page=hindi)

## Contact

- Phone/WhatsApp: +91 99295 15151
- Address: 2/11, DIFL House, Near Mama ka Hotel, Jawahar Nagar, Jaipur, Rajasthan, India
- Student portal: https://mydifl.in
